title: Middle Earth Experience
description: A small modpack with actively supported server enhancing your middle earth experience
body:
# Middle Earth Experience

**Immerse yourself in the world of Middle Earth!**  
This small, lightweight modpack enhances your adventure with essential quality-of-life mods, visual improvements, and Middle Earth–themed content — perfect for both solo exploration and community play.

**Actively supported server included!**  
Join our server to experience Middle Earth together:  
`IP: middleearth.ferox.host`

---

## Features
- Seamless Middle Earth integration with custom factions
- Enhanced farming, cooking, and brewing
- Smooth performance with Sodium & optimization mods
- Beautiful visuals with Iris Shaders support
- Minimap & worldmap for easy exploration

---

## Modlist
- Appleskin  
- Architectury API  
- Banner Claim  
- Brewin And Chewin  
- Cloth Config API  
- EMI  
- Fabric API  
- Farmers Delight  
- Iris Shaders  
- Middle Earth  
- Middle Earth Additions: Factions  
- Mod Menu  
- Sodium  
- Text Placeholder API  
- Xaero's Minimap  
- Xaero's Worldmap  

---

**Step into Middle Earth today and forge your own adventure!**
